topic: fortification, fermentation arrest, and alcohol increase
trigger_keywords: propósito de fortificar un vino generoso
detener la fermentación y aumentar el alcohol

steps.label: cause
steps.text: Grape spirit is added to a fermenting wine.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: The spirit raises alcohol to a level at which yeast activity stops or becomes impossible.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: Fermentation ends, alcohol increases, and residual sugar remains if fortification occurs before all sugar is consumed.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: Fermentation ends, alcohol increases, and residual sugar remains if fortification occurs before all sugar is consumed.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
